system.description:
This is the physical manifestation of Dreyfus's power of sight — his ability to perceive and report. It is perfectly ordinary in appearance except for the fact that no light seems to escape from it. It is cold to the touch.

Where Dreyfus collapsed, the snow was stained with shadow that slowly took the shape of a single golden eye — a perfect disc, cold but catching light from impossible angles. It did not dissolve.

Properties

Wyrd-sight (1/encounter): Once per encounter, the wielder can spend a Hero Token to activate this item. For 1 minute, the wielder sees through any active deception, disguise, or shape-change within Close Burst 5. Illusions shimmer and show their true forms. Lies are visible as distortions in the air around the speaker.

After the power is used, the eye goes dark and ordinary. It is no longer magical, but remains a memorial to the thing it once saw.

Attunement: This item is not attuned. Any hero can carry it, though only a hero who has earned trust can use its power without suffering backlash.

era-of-embers.note: Conditional loot — dropped by Dreyfus after his final defeat. Single-use Wyrd-sight, then goes dark permanently.
